GENERAL COMMISSIONS

These commissions are charged by WFG Mining Group for the platform to work. They are not related to the profit received by our investors

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    20% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire WFG Mining Group structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    10% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    20% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire WFG Mining Group structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    10% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

  • COMPANY COMMISSION

    0.5% from the received profit by the robot. This commission shows the earnings of the entire WFG Mining Group structure, namely, each employee.

  • ADMINISTRATIVE COMMISSION

    0.5% for technical support of the robot and the company as a whole. This commission includes the development and marketing costs of the company.

BEST WFG Mining Group TRADERS

The best cryptocurrency developers works in our company. They have a wealth of experience and understanding of the crypto market behind them. They brought WFG Mining Group to the world level of development

UNIQUE TRADING BOT

WFG Mining Group team of professionals has created a unique trading robot that makes profit at any stage of the market: rise or fall

STABLE AND AUTOMATED INVESTMENT

The robot is not human-related. And that is why all investments are reliable and completely safe

THE EXPERTS WILL DO EVERYTHING FOR YOU

The highly professional WFG Mining Group team controls all the processes of the trading robot around the clock. After investing, you will observe the growth of your capital in real time

INVEST WITH US AND GET STABLE INCOME

3 STEPS TO START

#1

SignUp

Click the SignUp button. Fill in your details to create a FREE WFG Mining Group account in seconds

#2

CHOOSE INVESTMENT PLAN

We offer a variety of investment plans to suit your financial goals. After reading, make a deposit

#3

START EARNING

After making a deposit, watch your capital grow by accumulating daily profit in real time
